## Severity (your assessment)

- [ ] cosmetic — visual glitch, no impact
- [ ] annoying — workaround exists
- [ ] blocking — feature unusable
- [ ] data loss / security — please email security contact instead of opening public issue

## Have you tried

- [ ] `/frappe-stack:diff` to check for drift
- [ ] Re-running `/frappe-stack:init` to refresh config
- [ ] Searching existing issues for the same symptom
